name: 3D Marquee
summary: A dynamic 3D marquee component that creates an infinite scrolling carousel with perspective transforms and depth effects for showcasing logos, testimonials, or content in motion.
detailedDescription: The 3D Marquee component creates a mesmerizing infinite scrolling display that combines traditional marquee functionality with three-dimensional perspective transforms. This component excels at showcasing client logos, partner badges, testimonials, product features, or any repeating content in a visually engaging format. The signature effect comes from applying CSS 3D transforms to create depth perception as items scroll across the screen, making content appear to move through physical space rather than simply sliding horizontally. The marquee supports both single and dual-direction scrolling, with the dual mode creating a more dynamic effect by having rows move in opposite directions simultaneously. Content is automatically duplicated to ensure seamless infinite looping without visible breaks or jumps. The component uses GPU-accelerated CSS animations for smooth, performant motion that maintains 60fps even with numerous items. Customization options include scroll speed, direction, gap between items, pause on hover, and perspective intensity. The 3D effect can be adjusted from subtle depth to dramatic perspective depending on design requirements. Perfect for social proof sections, partner showcases, or any context where continuous content display adds value without requiring user interaction.
purpose: Display continuous streams of logos, testimonials, or content in an engaging scrolling format
Create dynamic social proof sections that showcase clients, partners, or achievements
Add visual motion and energy to otherwise static page sections
Maximize content visibility by continuously cycling through items automatically
Provide ambient information display that doesn't require active user engagement
behavior: Continuously scrolls content horizontally with seamless infinite looping
Applies 3D perspective transforms to create depth during motion
Automatically duplicates content to eliminate visible loop points
Supports both single-direction and dual-direction (opposing rows) scrolling
Optionally pauses animation on hover for user inspection of content
Maintains smooth 60fps animation through GPU-accelerated CSS transforms
Adjusts item spacing, scroll speed, and perspective intensity via props
visualCharacteristics: Infinite horizontal scrolling creating continuous motion
Three-dimensional perspective with depth perception during movement
Smooth, fluid animation that feels premium and polished
Customizable density and pacing to match content and context
Modern, dynamic aesthetic that draws attention without overwhelming
Versatile appearance suitable for both subtle and bold design statements
recommendations: Use where moderate motion and reusable composition improve UX and clarity.
